assessmentQuestionVersion.name: H&P, Progress Notes, Transfers, and Discharge Summaries
assessmentQuestionVersion.questionText: Documents in the medical record a complete history and physical examination for acute and complex chronically ill patients upon initial admission/consultation and key components of patient's progress via progress notes as medically necessary, transfer, and discharge summary.

AssessmentQuestion.name: H&P, Progress Notes, Transfers, and Discharge Summaries
